.file-embed.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat-x scroll 0px 100% / 5px 5px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(64, 61, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(64, 61, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(64, 61, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(64, 61, 82) -webkit-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(246, 193, 119), rgb(235, 111, 146), rgb(235, 188, 186), rgb(196, 167, 231), rgb(156, 207, 216), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(64, 61, 82) -webkit-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgb(246, 193, 119), rgb(235, 111, 146), rgb(235, 188, 186), rgb(196, 167, 231), rgb(156, 207, 216), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

strong.background: rgb(235, 111, 146) linear-gradient(62deg, rgb(235, 111, 146) 0%, rgb(196, 167, 231) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

th.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
